name: ar-agents-demo-video
description: Remotion-built demo video for ar-agents: sociedad-IA en producción.

scripts.build: remotion render src/index.ts SociedadIaDemo out/demo.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p
scripts.build-fast: remotion render src/index.ts SociedadIaDemo out/demo-fast.mp4 --concurrency 4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p
scripts.render: remotion render src/index.ts SociedadIaDemo out/demo.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p
